description: Deterministic eval queries that target the local fixture corpus.

queries.query: How can I decode a JSON request body into a Go struct and validate required fields?
What is the Go pattern for outbound HTTP request timeouts with retry-safe errors?
How should context cancellation propagate through goroutines in a Go service?
How do I clean CSV columns and fill missing values with pandas before analytics?
How can FastAPI validate request payload schemas and return structured validation errors?
Which PostgreSQL index helps dashboard queries filtered by status and created_at?
How do I write SQL to aggregate monthly revenue and order by month?
How do I fetch data in React when filters change without stale useEffect behavior?
How can I debounce a TypeScript search box to cut down API request spam?
How do I configure docker compose for web plus redis with health checks and restart policies?
What is the difference between Kubernetes readiness and liveness probes in deployment configs?
How do I parse JSON into Rust structs using serde derive and handle parse errors?
